Structs

New Structs

[edit source]
New Structs
id params
6426(1) {'1077': 493, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Level-up chatbox list', '1088': 'skill, interface, levelup, level up, level, pop-up, chatbox, list', '1096': 'When enabled, a short list may be written in your chatbox when you level-up a skill, listing a few features that can be unlocked at that level. This does not use a pop-up menu, so it need not interrupt your actions.'}
6427(1) {'1077': 494, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1086': 'Level-up guide list', '1088': 'skill, interface, levelup, level up, level, pop-up, chatbox, list', '1096': 'When enabled, you will be invited to check the in-game skill guides after you level-up a skill, to see a list of features you've unlocked.'}

4493(1)
params {'1077': 315, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Disable level-up interface', '1088': 'combat, skill, interface, levelup, level up, level', '1096': 'When enabled, the level-up interface will no longer open and skill unlocks will not be shown. You will continue to get level-up fireworks, jingles, messages and broadcasts, but levelling will no longer delay or interrupt your actions.'} {'1077': 315, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1086': 'Level-up pop-up notifications', '1088': 'combat, skill, interface, levelup, level up, level, pop-up', '1096': 'When enabled, a pop-up may open in the chatbox to congratulate you as you level-up a skill.'}
4688(1)
params {'1077': 360, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Enable new-style skill guide interface', '1088': 'skill, interface', '1096': 'When enabled, the skill guide interface will feature a look that allows it to be resized as well as moved.'} {'1077': 360, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Enable new-style skill guide interface', '1088': 'skill, interface, menu, resize, stats, level', '1096': 'When enabled, the skill guide interface will feature a look that allows it to be resized as well as moved.'}

9662 213 skill_feature_agility_overview_0 [[6518], None, [Agility both increases the rate at which your Run Energy replenishes while not running and decreases the rate at which it drains while you run.], [8, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9663 213 skill_feature_agility_overview_1 [[6520], None, [You will also gain access to useful shortcuts across Gielinor; these are marked with a green arrow on your map.], [8, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9664 213 skill_feature_agility_overview_2 [[11849], None, [In order to train your Agility skill, you will need an Agility course; these are a series of obstacles that reward experience upon completion.], [8, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

9864 213 skill_feature_attack_overview_0 [[1279], None, [Your Attack level is used to determine how likely you are to hit your target in melee combat. A higher Attack level will give you a better chance to hit.], [1, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
9865 213 skill_feature_attack_overview_1 [[1333], None, [Additionally, a higher Attack level will allow you to wield more powerful weapons. A weapon with a higher Attack bonus will give you more accuracy in combat.], [1, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
9866 213 skill_feature_attack_overview_2 [[1215], None, [You can select your Attack style from the Combat Options side panel. Different enemies are weaker or stronger against different Attack styles, so choose carefully.], [1, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

9934 213 skill_feature_construction_overview_0 [[8794], None, [Construction gives you access to your very owned Player-Owned House. To get started, you'll need to buy a house from an Estate agent.], [22, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9935 213 skill_feature_construction_overview_1 [[960], None, [Once you have a house, you'll need to build furniture. Most furniture can be built with planks, which can be obtained via taking logs to a sawmill.], [22, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9936 213 skill_feature_construction_overview_2 [[2347], None, [To build furniture, grab a hammer and a saw, enter your house in build mode, select a hotspot and select the furniture you want to build.], [22, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9937 213 skill_feature_construction_overview_3 [[8151], None, [As your Construction level increases, you'll be able to build bigger houses, gain access to more kinds of room in your house, and be able to build fancier furniture.], [22, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
9938 213 skill_feature_construction_overview_4 [[795], None, [You'll also become able to build better facilities for boats.], [22, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

10485 213 skill_feature_cooking_overview_0 [[977], None, [Cooking is a skill that lets you make all kinds of delicious food that will typically restore your Hitpoints, amongst providing other benefits.], [16, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10486 213 skill_feature_cooking_overview_1 [[315], None, [At its most basic, Cooking can be done by simply taking raw meats and fish to either a fire or a range. You'll get better results overall if you use a range, though.], [16, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10487 213 skill_feature_cooking_overview_2 [[2309], None, [Some foods will require you to prepare your ingredients before you can cook them. For example, you first need to mix flour and water into a dough before you can bake them into bread.], [16, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10488 213 skill_feature_cooking_overview_3 [[379], None, [As your Cooking level increases, you'll get access to an increasing list of recipes. You'll also find that you accidentally burn your food less of the time as well.], [16, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

10704 213 skill_feature_crafting_overview_0 [[2347], None, [Crafting is a wide-ranging skill that allows you to create various pieces of armour, jewellery, equipment and more.], [11, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10705 213 skill_feature_crafting_overview_1 [[1741], None, [To craft armour out of animal hides, you'll typically first need to take the hides to a tanner to get them tanned, then combine them with a needle and thread, which can be acquired from certain Crafting shops in the world.], [11, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10706 213 skill_feature_crafting_overview_2 [[1761], None, [To make pottery, you'll need to obtain some soft clay, obtained by adding water to clay. You can then use a pottery wheel to shape the clay into an unfired item, which you can then finish in a pottery oven.], [11, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10707 213 skill_feature_crafting_overview_3 [[2357], None, [To make jewellery, you'll need to first get a crafting mould. You can then take that mould and some gold or silver bars to a furnace to craft your jewellery. At higher Crafting levels, you can cut gems and mould them simultaneously to create jewellery, which you can enchant with Magic!], [11, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

10919 213 skill_feature_defence_overview_0 [[1191], None, [Your Defence level determines how likely you are to block enemy attacks. The chances of this happening increase with your level, but be careful; you are never guaranteed to block every attack!], [5, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
10920 213 skill_feature_defence_overview_1 [[1147], None, [Additionally, a higher Defence level will allow you to equip more powerful shields and armour. As well as giving you better defensive stats, some armour will also increase your Attack or Strength bonuses as well.], [5, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

10971 212 skill_guide_subsection_farming_overview [[21], [0], [Overview], [1]]
10972 212 skill_guide_subsection_farming_allotments [[21], [1], [Allotments], [1]]

10985 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_0 [[6797], None, [Farming allows you to grow various flowers, vegetables, trees, herbs and more in farming patches across Gielinor.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10986 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_1 [[5166], None, [To get started, you'll need some seeds and a seed dibber, as well as a rake to remove weeds from the patch you want to use.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10987 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_2 [[5341], None, [Once you've cleared the patch, you can add your seed to it. You can also optionally water it with a watering can or add a bucket of compost to decrease the chances of your plant becoming diseased.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10988 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_3 [[5343], None, [It'll take a while for your plant to grow, so feel free to explore the world and come back to it later!], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10989 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_4 [[1942], None, [Once your plant has grown, you might need another tool to collect the harvest. For instance, you'll need a spade to dig up potatoes.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10990 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_5 [[6036], None, [If you're worried about your crops becoming diseased, most crops can be protected by the nearby gardeners. They'll usually want you to give them specific produce in payment.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
10991 213 skill_feature_farming_overview_6 [[6032], None, [As your Farming level increases, you'll gain access to more crops to grow, as well as obtaining greater yields when harvesting.], [21, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11079 213 skill_feature_farming_scarecrow_page [[6059], None, [Level 23 Farming allows you to make a scarecrow and place it in a flower patch.
Scarecrows ward sweetcorn from being attacked by birds, which helps to prevent disease.

How to make a scarecrow:
1. Fill an empty sack with straw from a bale.
2. Drive the hay sack onto a bronze spear.
3. Place a watermelon on top as a head.
4. Stand the scarecrow in an empty flower patch.], [21, -1, 9], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11110 213 skill_feature_firemaking_overview_0 [[590], None, [Firemaking is a skill that allows you to make fires. Simply use a tinderbox on a set of logs, and you'll attempt to set them on fire.], [17, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

11210 213 skill_feature_fishing_overview_0 [[341], None, [Fishing allows you to gather fish at various points across Gielinor. Typically, these will be indicated by moving bubbles on the surface of the water.], [15, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11211 213 skill_feature_fishing_overview_1 [[303], None, [Different fish require different equipment to catch; for instance, you need a fishing net to catch shrimp, but a fishing rod and bait to catch sardines.], [15, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11212 213 skill_feature_fishing_overview_2 [[377], None, [As your Fishing level increases, you'll gain access to more varieties of fish to catch, as well as having a higher chance of successfully catching fish when you try.], [15, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

11261 213 skill_feature_fishing_trawling_preamble [[7620], None, [Deep Sea Trawling is a Fishing method that takes place out at sea. Because of this, you need to be an experienced sailor with your own boat. For more information, you should speak to Netmaster Kellan in the Rolling Tide pub in Port Roberts.], [15, -1, 7], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11301 212 skill_guide_subsection_fletching_overview [[19], [0], [Overview], [1]]
11302 212 skill_guide_subsection_fletching_arrows [[19], [1], [Arrows], [1]]
11303 212 skill_guide_subsection_fletching_bows [[19], [2], [Bows], [1]]

11310 212 skill_guide_subsection_fletching_other [[19], [9], [Other], [1]]
11311 213 skill_feature_fletching_overview_0 [[314], None, [Fletching allows you to create various ranged weapons, as well as ammunition to go with them.], [19, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11312 213 skill_feature_fletching_overview_1 [[1777], None, [Making bows requires bowstring, which can be made from flax at a spinning wheel. You can use a knife on some logs to carve an unfinished bow, then add the bowstring to complete the weapon.], [19, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11313 213 skill_feature_fletching_overview_2 [[6447], None, [To create arrows, you'll first need to carve logs into arrow shafts with a knife, then tip the arrow shafts with feathers. Finally, you'll need to add some arrow heads.], [19, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11314 213 skill_feature_fletching_overview_3 [[9400], None, [To make bolts, you only need to combine unfinished bolts with feathers. You can also chisel gemstones down into bolt tips, with each gemstone being able to top a different bolt.], [19, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11315 213 skill_feature_fletching_arrow_shaft_15 [[6443], None, [15 Arrow shafts (Logs)], [19, 1, 1], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11437 213 skill_feature_herblore_overview_0 [[121], None, [You must complete the Druidic Ritual quest to unlock the Herblore skill.], [9, -1, 0], [34], None, [1], None, None, None]
11438 213 skill_feature_herblore_overview_1 [[221], None, [Herblore allows you to make potions with herbs and ingredients found across Gielinor.], [9, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11439 213 skill_feature_herblore_overview_2 [[199], None, [To make a potion, you first need to clean a grimy herb, then combine it with a vial of water to make an unfinished potion. You can then add the secondary ingredient(s) to complete the potion.], [9, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11602 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_0 [[744], None, [Hitpoints are used to tell you how healthy your character is. A character who reaches 0 Hitpoints has died, but will reappear in their chosen respawn location (normally Lumbridge).], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11603 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_1 [[379], None, [As with any skill, you will restore 1 missing Hitpoint every minute, but the best way of recovering Hitpoints is by eating food.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11604 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_2 [[7620], None, [If you see any red 'hit splats' during combat, the number shown corresponds to the number of Hitpoints lost as a result of that strike.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11605 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_3 [[7620], None, [Blue hit splats mean no damage has been dealt.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11606 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_4 [[7620], None, [Green hit splats are poison damage.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11607 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_5 [[7620], None, [Teal hit splats are venom damage.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11608 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_6 [[7620], None, [Orange hit splats are disease damage.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11609 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_overview_7 [[7620], None, [Dark purple hit splats are corruption damage.], [6, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11684 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_damage [[7620], [1358, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Regular damage from most sources.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11685 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_damage_maxhit [[7620], [3571, 25, 25, 0, 0], [Regular damage variant shown when you deal your maximum damage.
Most damage hitsplats have a highlighted max hit version.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11686 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_miss [[7620], [1358, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Miss/block - No damage dealt.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11687 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_boat [[7620], [6829, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Boat damage - Shows damage to a boat.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11688 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_shield [[7620], [1419, 25, 25, 2, 1], [Shield damage - Shows damage to a boss' shield or that a player was protected from an attack.
Example: The Hueycoatl's tail shield.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11689 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_armour [[7620], [1628, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Armour damage - Shows damage to a boss' armour.
Example: Zalcano's armour.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11690 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_poise [[7620], [4558, 25, 25, 0, 0], [Poise damage - Shows damage to a boss' poise, usually used to transition a boss to another phase.
Example: The Wardens in the Tombs of Amascut.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11691 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_corrosion [[7620], [4770, 25, 25, 0, 0], [Corrosion damage - Deals damage reduced by armour. May also apply a corrosion status effect, dealing damage in regular intervals.
Example: Shellbane gryphon.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11692 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_subtitle_1 [[7620], None, [Status Effects], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11693 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_poison [[7620], [1360, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Poison - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals, decreasing in potency over time.
Can be cured with an anti-poison effect.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11694 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_venom [[7620], [1632, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Venom - A more powerful form of Poison.
Can be cured with mutliple anti-poison effects or a single anti-venom effect.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11695 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_bleed [[7620], [4564, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Bleed damage - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals. Some types of bleed are more potent while moving.
Can be cured with an anti-bleed effect.
Example: Custodian Stalkers.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11696 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_burn [[7620], [4767, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Burn damage - Hitpoint damage dealt in regular intervals. Stacks up to <5>.
Example: Burning Claws special attack.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11697 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_disease_stat [[7620], [1633, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Disease stat drain - Drains a stat in regular intervals.
Can be reduced/cured with a cure disease effect.
Example: Zogres in Jiggig.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11698 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_disease_health [[7620], [1361, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Disease damage - If the stat being drained by an active Disease reaches 1, you start taking Hitpoint damage instead.
Can be reduced/cured with a cure disease effect.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11699 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_doom [[7620], [4766, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Doom - Shows amount of Doom stacks. A certain amount instantly kills the player.
Example: The Fortis Colosseum Doom modifier.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11700 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_subtitle_2 [[7620], None, [Drains and Restores], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11701 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_heal [[7620], [1629, 25, 25, 0, 1], [Healing from certain sources.
Example: The Blood Moon in Neypotzli.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11702 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_prayerdrain [[7620], [4561, 25, 25, 1, 0], [Prayer drain - Shows drain to a player's Prayer.
Example: Frost Nagua in the Ruins of Tapoyauik.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11703 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_corruption [[7620], [2270, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Corruption - Drains Prayer points over time.
Examples: Corruption spells and the Phantom Muspah encounter.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11704 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_cold [[7620], [4768, 25, 25, 1, 1], [Cold - Drains warmth.
Example: The cold in the Wintertodt encounter.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11705 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_charge_default [[7620], [1362, 25, 25, 1, 0], [Charge - Shows something is being charged.
Example: Totems in The Nightmare of Ashihama encounter.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11706 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_uncharge_default [[7620], [1363, 25, 25, 1, 0], [Uncharge - Shows charge is being removed from something.
Example: Totems in The Nightmare of Ashihama encounter.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11707 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_charge_blue [[7620], [3519, 25, 25, 1, 0], [Alternate charge - Shows something is being charged.
Example: Kephri's shield restore in the Tombs of Amascut.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11708 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_uncharge_blue [[7620], [3520, 25, 25, 1, 0], [Alternate uncharge - Shows charge is being removed from something.
Example: Crocodiles draining the Palm of Resourcefulness in the Tombs of Amascut.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11709 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_sanity_lose [[7620], [4764, 25, 25, 0, 0], [Sanity drain - Shows sanity lost form certain sources.
Example: Lost Souls in the Whisperer encounter.], [6, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11710 213 skill_feature_hitpoints_hitsplats_sanity_gain [[7620], [4765, 25, 25, 0, 0], [Sanity Gain - Shows sanity gained form certain sources.

11727 213 skill_feature_hunter_overview_0 [[9951], None, [Hunter lets you track and catch a wide variety of wildlife, granting access to various unique materials in the process.], [23, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11728 213 skill_feature_hunter_overview_1 [[10006], None, [Each animal you can hunt will typically be found in a specfic locale, and will require different gear. Make sure you come prepared!], [23, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
11729 213 skill_feature_hunter_overview_2 [[9976], None, [As your Hunter level improves, not only will you be able to hunt a wider variety of creatures, but you'll also be able to maintain more traps simultaneously, and they will successfully trap creatures more often.], [23, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

11868 213 skill_feature_magic_overview_0 [[579], None, [Magic grants you access to a wide variety of spells. To cast each spell, you will need a specific set of runes.
Select a spell in this guide to see what runes it requires.], [4, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11869 213 skill_feature_magic_overview_1 [[1017], None, [Select a spell on the 'Magic' side-panel to begin casting it.
If a spell is supposed to work on a nearby monster, player or object, you should select the spell, then select the target on which you wish to cast the spell.], [4, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11870 213 skill_feature_magic_overview_2 [[1379], None, [Staves can also be used to auto-cast certain offensive spells in combat. To enable this, equip your staff, go to the 'Combat Options' side panel, and select one of the 'Spell' options.], [4, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
11871 213 skill_feature_magic_overview_3 [[1381], None, [You can use certain pieces of equipment to replace runes in order to cast spells. For instance, an equipped Staff of Air counts as an infinite supply of air runes.], [4, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

12149 212 skill_guide_subsection_mining_overview [[13], [0], [Overview], [0]]
12150 212 skill_guide_subsection_mining_rocks [[13], [1], [Rocks], [0]]
12151 212 skill_guide_subsection_mining_equipment [[13], [2], [Equipment], [0]]
12152 212 skill_guide_subsection_mining_areas [[13], [3], [Areas], [0]]
12153 212 skill_guide_subsection_mining_shootingstars [[13], [4], [Shooting Stars], [0]]
12154 213 skill_feature_mining_overview_0 [[1267], None, [Mining allows you to get various minerals from the world for use in other skills, primarily Smithing.], [13, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12155 213 skill_feature_mining_overview_1 [[440], None, [To mine a rock, simply interact with it while holding a pickaxe you have the level to use and you'll start mining it. Eventually, you'll collect the ore and the rock will deplete. Low-level rocks will replenish themselves fairly quickly, but higher-level ones will take longer and longer to come back.], [13, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12156 213 skill_feature_mining_overview_2 [[1275], None, [At higher Mining levels, you'll have an increased chance of successfully mining a rock. You'll also be able to use more powerful pickaxes, which decrease the amount of time between mining attempts.], [13, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12157 213 skill_feature_mining_overview_3 [[444], None, [Note that while most pickaxes have an Attack level requirement to equip them, you're still able to use them from within your inventory if you have the required Mining level.], [13, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

12226 213 skill_feature_prayer_overview_0 [[3258], None, [Prayer allows you to access different prayers, available from the Prayer side panel. Each prayer offers a different powerful benefit.], [7, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12227 213 skill_feature_prayer_overview_1 [[20803], None, [Using prayers will drain your prayer points over time. Once you run out of prayer points, you will be unable to use any prayers. You can restore your prayer points by praying at an altar.], [7, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12228 213 skill_feature_prayer_overview_2 [[544], None, [Some pieces of equipment will grant you a Prayer bonus, which will reduce the rate at which your prayer points are drained.], [7, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12229 213 skill_feature_prayer_overview_3 [[526], None, [The most common way to increase your Prayer level is to offer the remains of the enemies you kill. Burying their bones and scattering their ashes will award you Prayer experience.], [7, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12230 213 skill_feature_prayer_thickskin [[20803], [115, 30, 30, 0, 0], [Thick Skin
Increases your defence by 5%.], [7, 1, 1], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

12293 212 skill_guide_subsection_ranged_bows [[3], [1], [Bows], [0]]
12294 212 skill_guide_subsection_ranged_thrown [[3], [2], [Thrown], [1]]

12301 213 skill_feature_ranged_overview_0 [[841], None, [Your Ranged level determines how accurate you are with ranged weapons, as well as how much damage they do. A higher Ranged level will result in more hits that do more damage.], [3, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12302 213 skill_feature_ranged_overview_1 [[888], None, [Most ranged weapons will need a specific kind of ammunition to go with them; for instance, bows will need arrows and crossbows will need bolts.], [3, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12303 213 skill_feature_ranged_overview_2 [[9185], None, [As your Ranged level increases, you will also get access to more powerful weapons and ammunition. Typically, each ranged weapon can only handle ammo up to a certain level; for instance, an oak bow can only fire bronze, iron or steel arrows, but not mithril.], [3, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12304 213 skill_feature_ranged_bows_shortbow [[841], None, [Standard bows
Ammo: Arrows up to iron], [3, 1, 1], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

Ammo: Arrows up to steel], [3, 5, 1], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

Ammo: Arrows up to mithril], [3, 20, 1], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12307 213 skill_feature_ranged_bows_maple_shortbow [[853], None, [Maple bows
Ammo: Arrows up to adamant], [3, 30, 1], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12308 213 skill_feature_ranged_bows_zogre_bow [[4827], None, [Ogre composite bows
Ammo: 'Brutal' arrows up to rune], [3, 30, 1], None, [Instructions obtained via Zogre Flesh Eaters], [1], None, None, None]

Ammo: Arrows up to rune], [3, 40, 1], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

12423 213 skill_feature_runecraft_overview_0 [[1436], None, [Runecraft is the skill that allows you to convert essences into runes, which you can use to cast spells.], [12, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12424 213 skill_feature_runecraft_overview_1 [[1438], None, [To create runes, you'll first need some essence and a talisman of the rune you want to make. You can use the talisman to both locate and access the runic altar, which is where the runes are crafted.], [12, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12425 213 skill_feature_runecraft_overview_2 [[554], None, [Higher Runecraft levels will allow you to craft more kinds of runes. At higher levels, you'll also be able to make multiple runes per essence.], [12, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

12449 213 skill_feature_runecraft_multipreamble [[7620], None, [As your Runecraft skill develops, you become able to craft multiple runes from each piece of essence. 12486 213 skill_feature_runecraft_3preamble [[7620], None, [Pouches come in various sizes which allow you to carry extra essence in them.
As you use the pouches they degrade and store less essence. Speak to the Dark Mage at the centre of the Abyss to restore them.], [12, -1, 3], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

12519 213 skill_feature_sailing_overview_0 [[31337], None, [You must complete the Pandemonium quest to unlock the Sailing skill.], [24, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
12520 213 skill_feature_sailing_overview_1 [[32241], None, [Sailing gives you the ability to captain a boat and sail the seas of Gielinor. Out at sea, you'll find all kinds of things to do. You can salvage shipwrecks for sunken treasure, test yourself in Barracuda Trials, or explore uncharted islands, to name but a few possibilities.], [24, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
12521 213 skill_feature_sailing_overview_2 [[32256], None, [As your Sailing level increases, you'll be able to own more boats, build better facilities on your boats, hire more crewmates, dock at more locations, and much more!], [24, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

12725 212 skill_guide_subsection_slayer_overview [[20], [0], [Overview], [1]]
12726 212 skill_guide_subsection_slayer_monsters [[20], [1], [Monsters], [1]]
12727 212 skill_guide_subsection_slayer_equipment [[20], [2], [Equipment], [1]]
12728 212 skill_guide_subsection_slayer_slayermasters [[20], [3], [Slayer Masters], [1]]
12729 213 skill_feature_slayer_overview_0 [[964], None, [Slayer is a skill that lets you fight increasingly dangerous and lucrative monsters. Some monsters can only be fought if you have a high enough Slayer level.], [20, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
12730 213 skill_feature_slayer_overview_1 [[4155], None, [To get started with Slayer, you'll first need a Slayer task, which can be obtained by speaking to a Slayer Master. You can then kill the assigned target to get Slayer experience.], [20, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
12731 213 skill_feature_slayer_overview_2 [[11864], None, [Once you've completed five tasks, you can start earning reward points. These can be used to skip or block tasks you don't want, or to purchase useful equipment, or to unlock benefits such as extended tasks.], [20, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

12829 213 skill_feature_smithing_overview_0 [[5086], None, [Smithing lets you convert raw ores into useful metals, then use those metals to make your own weapons and armour.], [14, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12830 213 skill_feature_smithing_overview_1 [[440], None, [To smelt ores, simply take the mix of ores you need to any furnace and you'll be able to convert them into bars.], [14, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12831 213 skill_feature_smithing_overview_2 [[2347], None, [Once you have your bars, grab a hammer and take them to an anvil. Bigger items will need more bars to make.], [14, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
12832 213 skill_feature_smithing_overview_3 [[1127], None, [As you advance your Smithing level, you'll be able to make make more gear out of higher quality metals.], [14, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]

13083 213 skill_feature_strength_overview_0 [[1335], None, [Your Strength level determines your max hit in combat. Whenever you hit your opponent, you will deal a random amount of damage up to your max hit.], [2, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
13084 213 skill_feature_strength_overview_1 [[3204], None, [Most weapons have a Strength bonus that will also increase your max hit. 13126 213 skill_feature_thieving_overview_0 [[1004], None, [Thieving lets you steal items from various people and stalls. Be careful, as people won't take too kindly to you going through their pockets, and might call the guards on you, or may take matters into their own hands.], [10, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]
13127 213 skill_feature_thieving_overview_1 [[28821], None, [As your Thieving level increases, the odds of you successfully stealing from your target will increase. You will also gain access to more lucrative targets with more valuable loot.], [10, -1, 0], None, None, [1], None, None, None]

13208 212 skill_guide_subsection_woodcutting_axes [[18], [2], [Axes], [0]]

13211 213 skill_feature_woodcutting_overview_0 [[8175], None, [Woodcutting allows you to chop down trees to obtain logs. Most trees in the game can be chopped down with an axe.], [18, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
13212 213 skill_feature_woodcutting_overview_1 [[1511], None, [Increasing your Woodcutting level will give you a higher chance of successfully chopping a tree. You'll also gain access to more trees to cut down.], [18, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
13213 213 skill_feature_woodcutting_overview_2 [[1359], None, [In addition to this, higher Woodcutting levels grant access to more powerful axes, which also increase the chance of chopping trees. Note that you can still use an axe in your inventory if you have the Woodcutting level for it, even if you don't have the Attack level to equip it.], [18, -1, 0], None, None, [0], None, None, None]
